projectDescription: Vell is a next-generation document markup language that combines Markdown's readability with LaTeX's expressive power, featuring a deterministic AST, reactive variables, directives, math support, and a full toolchain including CLI, LSP server, WASM bindings, HTML/PDF renderers, and VS Code extension.
keyFeatures: Human-readable syntax — headings, bold, italic, links, lists, tables with familiar Markdown-like notation
Deterministic PEG grammar — every valid input has exactly one parse tree (O(n) linear time)
Versioned AST — same source always produces the same abstract syntax tree
LaTeX math support — inline ($...$) and block ($$...$$) rendered as MathML
Reactive variables — @var declarations, @{name} interpolation, @for loops, @if conditionals
Extension system — namespaced @[org/Name](props) for custom plugins and third-party integrations
Full CLI toolchain — vell parse, vell fmt, vell render html/pdf/slides, vell validate
Idempotent formatter — canonical, auto-formatting for .vl files
Full LSP server — diagnostics, completions, hover, go-to-definition, rename, semantic tokens, and 14+ more features
WebAssembly bindings — run the Rust parser in any browser or Node.js environment
HTML5 renderer — complete AST-to-HTML5 with MathML, footnotes, cross-references, interactive runtime
PDF renderer — direct AST-to-PDF using pdfkit (no HTML intermediate)
VS Code extension — syntax highlighting, LSP integration, format and export commands
Bibliography support — BibTeX and YAML-style inline references with APA, IEEE, Chicago, Nature citation styles
publicApiSurface: vell parse [input] — print AST as JSON
vell fmt [input] [--check] — format to canonical style
vell render html [input] [-o output] — render to HTML5
vell render pdf [input] [-o output] — render to PDF-optimized HTML
vell render slides [input] [-o output] — render to reveal.js slides
WASM: parse(source) → JsValue (AST JSON or error)
